par.note: Unusual par 74 due to two par-6 holes (4th and 13th) — 878 and 861 yards respectively.

green_fee_weekday_thb.note: Standalone green fee only (excl. caddie 400 THB and cart 700 THB). Last updated 2021 per where2golf. Golfdd special package weekday 3,350 THB all-in (caddie+cart). Club Thailand all-in weekday 2,650 member / 4,350 visitor (valid Apr–Oct 2026).

green_fee_weekend_thb.note: Standalone green fee only (excl. caddie 400 THB and cart 700 THB). Golfdd special package weekend 3,550 THB all-in. Club Thailand all-in weekend 2,850 member / 4,850 visitor (valid Apr–Oct 2026).

caddie_fee_thb.note: Golfdd shows 450 THB caddie fee; where2golf shows 400 THB. Best estimate 400–450 THB.

cart_fee_thb.note: Where2golf: 700 THB. Golfasian: 700 THB. Golfdd: 900 THB. Pattayagolf.net: 900 THB. Cart is compulsory.

cart_required.note: Multiple sources confirm caddies and carts are compulsory.

driving_range.note: aroundpattaya.com shows no driving range icon. golfthink.com text mentions practice facilities. Treat as PROVISIONAL — likely no driving range.

website.note: Wix-hosted site. 1golf.eu lists www.standrews2000golf.com but the domain returns ECONNREFUSED — site appears down. Wix URL is the best available.

phone.note: 1golf.eu lists +66 38 030 6602. Multiple sources cite slightly different numbers. Primary: +66 38 030 660.

address.value: 9/36 Moo 7 Samnakthon, Ban Chang, Rayong 21130, Thailand

distance_from_bangkok_km.note: ~120 km from Bangkok per pattayagolf.net; ~190 km via road routing. Ban Chang is ~45 min past Pattaya.

drive_time_from_bangkok_min.note: Approximately 2–2.5 hours from Bangkok via Highway 7. 40–45 min from Pattaya city.

club_rental_fee_thb.note: 1,200 THB per golfasian.com. aroundpattaya.com shows 700 THB — different set.

renovation_note: As of May 2025 golfdd.com listed the course as closed for renovation with planned reopening in December (2025). Club Thailand card shows rates valid from April 1, 2026, confirming the course has reopened post-renovation. A January 2025 TripAdvisor review noted open conditions but poor maintenance — the renovation appears to have occurred mid-2025.
